sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89097" key="prosentupo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεν-τῠπόω</orth>, <sense id="n89097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mould besides</tr_>, of massage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
